title: Splott in-work progression pilot
focus: Extending in-work support beyond the week-8 cliff edge
summary: Pilot a structured 6-month in-work progression offer for apprentices and entry-level hires in financial services. Addresses the Splott insight that bus times leave shift workers stranded after 18:00 and the wider gap that J4 entry-to-work programmes hand off into nothing at week 8.

title: ESOL capacity in Riverside and Grangetown
focus: Reduce 4+ month ESOL waits with co-located outreach
summary: Expand ESOL provision through a co-located outreach model in Riverside and Grangetown, where the coalition insight is that refugees and asylum seekers wait 4+ months for a place. Without language progression, employability and integration support cannot land.

title: ALN school to post-16 transition
focus: Smoothing the J2→J3 handoff for young people with additional learning needs
summary: Coordinated handoff between schools, the FE college and supported-employment programmes for young people with additional learning needs. Addresses the Grangetown insight that the sharpest gap is at school-to-post-16, with support routinely lost and parents left to navigate alone.
